title: OP Dirt
description: When breaking dirt, you'll get OP items!
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to another of my OP datapacks! In this pack, Dirt gives OP Loot! Using Silk Touch, still gives you Dirt.

When mining Dirt, instead of getting Dirt, you'll get 1 of the following:

-Diamond Blocks 32-64 -Iron Blocks 32-64 -Amethyst Blocks 32-64 -Netherite Blocks 32-64 -Emerald Blocks 32-64 -Obsidian 32-64 -Shulker Shell -Enchanted Golden Apples 16-32 -Ender Pearls 1-16 -Ender Eyes 1-16 -Exp Bottles 32-64 -Totem of Undying -High Enchanted Weapons (From Wood to Netherite) -High Enchanted Tools (From Wood to Netherite) -High Enchanted Armor (From Leather to Netherite) -High Enchanted Chainmail Armor -Enchanted Elytra -High Enchanted Bows and Crossbows -High Enchanted Tridents -Enchanted Shield -Random Enchanted Books -Different Armor Templates -Different Sherds
